zh.Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根
zh.Griffith Gwyr, Priscedwyn, Glamorganshir: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lewis ap Rees Lloyd於1490年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾時，他的父親Rees Lloyd28歲，母親Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan26歲。他於1520年之前與Gladys Henry在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年之後在威爾士格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.Griffith Gwyr, Priscedwyn, Glamorganshir: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lewis ap Rees Lloyd于1490年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根爾时，他的父亲Rees Lloyd28岁，母亲Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan26岁。他于1520年之前与Gladys Henry在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年之后在威尔士格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: Rees
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

variants.name: Rice
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized pronunciation of one of the most common Welsh personal names, Rhys, from a form originally meaning ‘rash, impetuous’, also spelled Rys and Re(e)s. See also Reese , with which it is interchangeable as a result of different Anglicized forms of the Welsh vowel y, and also compare Preece and Price . Initial R- in Welsh is voiceless and often spelled Rh-, but in English R- is voiced as in the Anglicized surnames Rees and Rice. Welsh y is a short back vowel /ɪ/. In the medieval period the English approximation of this vowel was either /i/ or /e/, lengthened to /i:/ and /e:/. Subsequent sound changes in English produced the alternative pronunciations represented in Rees, Preece and Rice, Price. The name has also been established in Ireland from an early date.

English: either a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a thicket (Middle English ris, rice, ris, from Old English hrīs, Old Norse hrís), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place called with this word, such as Rise (East Yorkshire).

English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English Rys(e) and Re(e)s which when without a preposition could derive from one or other of several Old French and Middle English words, including Anglo-Norman French ris ‘laughter, smile’, Middle English ris, res ‘stem, stalk’, in origin the same word as in 2 above, and Middle English ris, rise, rice, res, Old French ris, riz ‘rice’, perhaps a nickname for a rice dealer or a cook.

nameMeanings.name: Lloyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: descriptive nickname from Welsh llwyd ‘gray’. InWelsh the color term llwyd also includes shades of brown, andit is likely that, when used with reference to younger men,llwyd denoted brown or mouse-colored hair.

nameMeanings.name: Lewis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

variants.name: Lewys
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lewis ap Rees Lloyd was born in 1490, in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Rees Lloyd, was 28 and his mother, Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan, was 26. He married Gladys Henry before 1520, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died after 1520, in Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.Griffith Gwyr, Priscedwyn, Glamorganshir: Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lewis ap Rees Lloyd est né en 1490, à Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rees Lloyd, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Gladys Henry avant 1520, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1520, à Glamorgan, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lewis ap Rees Lloyd 1490 in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rees Lloyd 28 und seine Mutter Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan 26. Er hat vor 1520 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Gladys Henry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1520 in Glamorgan, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lewis ap Rees Lloyd è nato il nel 1490 nel Gwyr, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Rees Lloyd, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Gladys Henry prima del 1520, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1520, nel Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Lewis ap Rees Lloydが1490年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガングウイルで生まれた時，父Rees Lloydは28歳，母Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychanは26歳であった。1520年以前にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでGladys Henryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年以後にウェールズグラモーガンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lewis ap Rees Lloyd(이)가 1490년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 그w이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rees Lloyd(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1520년 이전 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Gladys Henry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 이후 웨일스 글램르건에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lewis ap Rees Lloyd nasceu em 1490, em Gwyr, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rees Lloyd, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Gladys Henry antes 1520, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1520, em Glamorgan, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lewis ap Rees Lloyd родился в 1490 г. в местности гвир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rees Lloyd было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Gladys Henry перед 1520 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1520 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lewis ap Rees Lloyd nació en 1490, en Gwyr, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rees Lloyd, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne ferch Watkin Roper Vychan, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gladys Henry antes de 1520, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1520, en Glamorgan, Gales.
